facts.notes: PASS: Upper scene faithful with lady, dark veil, rose-pink gown, yellow sleeves, green sash/scarf. Large old lute crosses body diagonally with strumming hand near body and other hand on neck. Head/gaze turns toward swift at upper-left. Lower panel has one golden cornucopia with fruit spilling left and twisted horn tapering right. Final preserves Moon upper/lower staging.

production.notes: FAIL: Raw underlay includes a hard bottom panel/divider line, which violates the raw-art constraint against drawing final Moon horizontal rule or divider structure. No fake text/labels/watermark; final overlay is readable and does not obscure main elements, but raw furniture-like line requires regeneration.
